search_queries_used: site:rcoa.ac.uk GPAS day surgery pain scoring recovery
site:doh.gov.ae recovery pain score day surgery
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for PACU pain score review
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for PACU pain score review
rejection_reasons: A score cannot automatically determine medicine or discharge.
The candidate source category "opioid dose protocols" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Day-surgery and PACU patients whose pain score is assessed and reviewed.
setting_applicability: Direct for recovery pain-score documentation; the scoring tool and management remain local and clinician-led.
UAE_applicability: International RCoA evidence supported by DoH recovery requirements; UAE policy remains required.
recency_verification: Current RCoA GPAS 2025, DoH V1/2024, and current ASA 2024 standards were reviewed on 2026-07-13.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact RCoA section supports pain scoring in recovery and documentation of ongoing recovery and discharge processes; it does not select a score or treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports pain scoring, unplanned admission, discharge protocol, written information, contact arrangements, escort or support, and discharge summary documentation.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for PACU pain score review; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Score tool, value, trend, acceptable target, functional status, medicine, dose, response, complex pain, and discharge implication remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
